description: You are an urban planning consultant analyzing political influence zones and regional connectivity around world capital cities. Generate a shapefile at /home/ga/gvsig_exports/capital_buffers.shp containing buffer polygons with a 2 geographic degrees radius for all national capitals (where the FEATURECLA field equals 'Admin-0 capital') using the populated places layer at /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp. The output must preserve all original point attribute fields and contain exactly one polygon per capital city.
